prompt: A clean, modern 2D square board frame for a mobile word puzzle game. A perfect square frame with elegant rounded corners, colored in soft but vivid bright pastel blue. It has a visible, recessed inner square area with soft inner shadows (depth effect) where puzzle tiles can sit. Minimalist vector art style, clean lines, simple flat design with very subtle soft gradients, highly polished for mobile UI. No text, no letters, no numbers. Symmetric, perfectly centered composition. Transparent background, square format.
